metadata.description: Custom Claude Code plugins â€” multi-phase AI development pipeline (essense-flow + autopilot), data exploration, prompt modifiers, project question tracking, and cross-platform alerts.

plugins.name: essense-flow
plugins.description: Multi-phase AI development pipeline. Closed contracts, evidence-bound review, fail-soft hooks, no resource caps. Eleven skills (elicit, research, triage, architect, organize, build, glossary, review, verify, context, heal) drive a state machine from project pitch to shipped code. /organize (post-architect) and /glossary (post-build) are optional DRY phases powered by the plugin-toolkit code-glossary engine. Every phase-producing skill writes artifact + transitions state atomically. Every agent self-report is re-validated against disk â€” drift is auditable, not silent. Hooks are advisory: context-inject surfaces phase + canonical paths on every prompt, next-step suggests the recommended slash command on Stop. Both fail-soft on degraded state â€” never block tool calls. v0.7.0 archived on archive/essense-flow-v0.7.

plugins.name: essense-autopilot
plugins.description: Stop-hook autopilot for essense-flow pipelines. Drives the pipeline forward across phases without you typing between steps. Halts at human gates (eliciting, organizing, glossarying, verifying), real blockers, in-flight background Agent calls (transcript-scan), forward-detect for sprint-complete + QA-REPORT, and no-progress (same phase + sprint + wave as last fire â†’ suggests /heal). Opt-in per project via .pipeline/config.yaml. Diagnostic stderr on every halt path.

plugins.name: schema-scout
plugins.description: CLI tool for exploring the schema and values of any data file (XLSX, CSV, JSON). Auto-detects JSON in cells, repairs double-encoded UTF-8, prunes overflow artifacts.

plugins.name: thorough-mode
plugins.description: Prompt modifiers â€” keyword triggers (++, @thorough, @ship, @present, @debug, @verify, @fresh) that inject behavioral rules for thoroughness, documentation checks, interactive questions, root-cause investigation, paranoid verification, and context refresh. Smart hints suggest modifiers when you describe the intent without the keyword. @ship integrates with plugin-toolkit (/version-bump + /docs-audit) when used in mk-cc-resources plugin repo.

plugins.name: project-note-tracker
plugins.description: Track questions per handler/department. Auto-detects which handler should answer, researches from project context in the background, logs to an Excel tracker, generates meeting agendas. Auto-gitignores itself.

plugins.name: alert-sounds
plugins.description: Cross-platform alerts for Claude Code events â€” sound, desktop notifications, status line colors, volume control, and mute/unmute. Fully configurable per event.

plugins.name: session-lifecycle
plugins.description: Session lifecycle tools â€” handoff (capture session state), resume (restore context from handoff), claude-md-sync (propose CLAUDE.md updates after changes), retro (metrics-driven retrospective), meta-review (diagnose session: multi-step chains, skill friction, plugin coverage gaps). Designed as cohesive set: handoff triggers claude-md-sync when stale, resume reads handoff output, meta-review diagnoses what's worth automating from observed patterns.

plugins.name: plugin-toolkit
plugins.description: Plugin/skill development + maintenance toolkit. /skill-heal audits a plugin's skill set against current best practices (parallel review agents, scorecard, diagnostic only). /plugin-scaffold bootstraps a new plugin with full directory + cross-references (9-step chain in one invocation). /version-bump cascades version updates across plugin.json + marketplace.json + bundle + metadata + RELEASE-NOTES with semver validation. /docs-audit cross-checks CLAUDE.md + README + marketplace.json against disk state and proposes targeted fixes. /code-glossary (v2) audits any codebase for DRY violations â€” a deterministic Python engine (Python/TS/JS/C# via stdlib AST + tree-sitter) indexes every function, fingerprints 5 signals, and clusters duplicates; in-session sub-agents label against a 147-verb controlled vocabulary, review each cluster (Pass B), substrate-verify instances (Pass C), and judge near-miss candidates generated deterministically. Optional block scanner (--scan-blocks) surfaces duplicated sub-function guard patterns. Writes GLOSSARY.yaml (frozen schema, /dry-refactor input) + GLOSSARY.md. Also powers essense-flow's /organize + /glossary phases. Composable â€” @ship references /version-bump + /docs-audit; /skill-heal hints at /docs-audit when description quality is weak.

plugins.name: mk-cc-all
plugins.description: All currently-active mk-cc-resources skills in one install: essense-flow, schema-scout, thorough-mode, project-note-tracker, session-lifecycle, plugin-toolkit. essense-autopilot and alert-sounds carry hooks and must be installed separately. Benched plugins (miltiaze, ladder-build, architect, safe-commit, project-structure, repo-audit, mk-flow) are preserved on the archive/benched-plugins branch.
